instruction: Two subtle issues on the cloud icon: the red side stripe is the wrong shade (slightly-darker black) AND it has drifted slightly (~3px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M18 10h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 9 20h9a5 5 0 0 0 0-10z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#212121" x="12" y="19" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><path d="M18 10h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 9 20h9a5 5 0 0 0 0-10z"/></g>
  <rect id="stripe" fill="#e63946" x="12" y="16" width="4" height="96" />
</svg>
